Interface DRIDesignCrosstab

All Superinterfaces:
DRIDesignComponent, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DRDesignCrosstab
public interface DRIDesignCrosstab extends DRIDesignComponent

DRIDesignCrosstab interface.

Ricardo Mariaca
